            Reviews

            From The People

            PRAJNA RAKSHIT
            Fashion Enthusiast

            "An one stop shop for sarees, from pure Kanjeevaram to organza u will get it all. A wide range of sarees, blouses and kurtis from exclusive to pocket friendly all are available here. I loved their collection and recommend all to visit their stores"

            I keep coming back for more!
            Ratnottama Sengupta
            Fasion Enthusiast

            "Fabulous quality, great selection/curation, the prices are a perfect fit for the quality probably could even be termed as reasonable, friendly helpful staff - I'd say it'll be a challenge to walk out without making a purchase"

            I recommend them to all my friends.
            Soumi Sarkar
            Fashion Enthusiast

            "Its a long running relationship with Ethnic boutique.. Stunning collection..!! Assistance is praiseworthy..!! In terms of quality one can blindly trust on 'em..!! Will look forward to shop more...!!!! ❤️❤️"

            It's the perfect fashion store
            Devaleena Ghosh
            Fashion Enthusiast

            "Wonderful experience. I walked into a saree store after ages all by myself but the staff made me feel so comfortable. Will definitely come back soon."

            I've found some of my signature looks here!
